injection_method: Set memory limit to 32Mi on cartservice container
expected_root_cause: Container cartservice exceeded 32Mi memory limit; OOM killer terminated process with exit code 137
primary_symptoms: Pod restart with OOMKilled reason; increased latency on cart operations; HTTP 500 from frontend when accessing cart
expected_log_patterns: OOMKilled; exit code 137; container killed by OOM; memory cgroup out of memory
expected_recovery_action: Increase memory limit to 128Mi or optimize cartservice memory usage

injection_method: Set memory limit to 24Mi on recommendationservice container
expected_root_cause: Container recommendationservice exceeded 24Mi memory limit during model loading; OOM killer terminated process
primary_symptoms: Pod restart with OOMKilled reason; recommendation section unavailable on frontend; gRPC deadline exceeded from frontend
expected_log_patterns: OOMKilled; Cannot allocate memory; exit code 137; killed process
expected_recovery_action: Increase memory limit to 96Mi; recommendationservice loads ML model requiring more memory

injection_method: Set memory limit to 16Mi on checkoutservice container
expected_root_cause: Container checkoutservice exceeded 16Mi memory limit under load; OOM killed
primary_symptoms: Checkout failures; HTTP 500 on /cart/checkout; pod restarts with OOMKilled
expected_log_patterns: OOMKilled; runtime: out of memory; exit code 137
expected_recovery_action: Increase memory limit to 64Mi

injection_method: Set memory limit to 16Mi with large product catalog loaded
expected_root_cause: Container productcatalogservice memory exceeded 16Mi limit when loading full catalog into memory
primary_symptoms: Product listing pages fail; gRPC errors from dependent services; pod CrashLoopBackOff after repeated OOM
expected_log_patterns: OOMKilled; exit code 137; failed to load products
expected_recovery_action: Increase memory limit to 64Mi; consider streaming product catalog instead of full load

injection_method: Set memory limit to 32Mi on frontend container under load
expected_root_cause: Container frontend exceeded 32Mi memory limit under sustained traffic from loadgenerator
primary_symptoms: All user-facing requests fail; HTTP 502 from ingress; pod restarts with OOMKilled; loadgenerator reports errors
expected_log_patterns: OOMKilled; exit code 137; memory limit exceeded
expected_recovery_action: Increase memory limit to 128Mi; frontend serves concurrent requests requiring more memory

injection_method: Inject exit(1) into paymentservice startup by corrupting entrypoint
expected_root_cause: paymentservice container crashes on startup due to corrupted entrypoint script; kubelet restarts with exponential backoff
primary_symptoms: Pod status CrashLoopBackOff; checkout flow fails; increasing restart count; BackOff events
expected_log_patterns: Back-off restarting failed container; exit code 1; CrashLoopBackOff; Error from server
expected_recovery_action: Fix entrypoint script or restore correct container image

injection_method: Set invalid SMTP config causing emailservice to crash on connection attempt
expected_root_cause: emailservice crashes during initialization when unable to connect to configured SMTP endpoint
primary_symptoms: Pod restarts repeatedly; email confirmation fails; checkout completes but no email sent
expected_log_patterns: CrashLoopBackOff; connection refused; SMTP connection failed; Back-off restarting
expected_recovery_action: Fix SMTP configuration or make email sending non-blocking

injection_method: Inject null pointer exception in currencyservice initialization
expected_root_cause: currencyservice crashes with unhandled exception during currency rate initialization
primary_symptoms: Currency conversion fails; product prices show errors; pod restarts; CrashLoopBackOff status
expected_log_patterns: CrashLoopBackOff; NullPointerException; exit code 1; failed to initialize
expected_recovery_action: Fix initialization code or provide fallback currency rates

injection_method: Inject port conflict causing shippingservice bind failure
expected_root_cause: shippingservice cannot bind to configured port; crashes immediately on startup
primary_symptoms: Shipping cost calculation unavailable; checkout fails; pod in CrashLoopBackOff
expected_log_patterns: CrashLoopBackOff; address already in use; bind: permission denied; exit code 1
expected_recovery_action: Fix port configuration or resolve port conflict

injection_method: Inject missing required flag causing adservice to exit on startup
expected_root_cause: adservice exits with error due to missing required command-line flag

expected_log_patterns: CrashLoopBackOff; missing required flag; exit code 2; Usage error
expected_recovery_action: Add missing flag to container args or deployment manifest

injection_method: Change frontend image tag to nonexistent version (v99.99.99)

expected_log_patterns: Failed to pull image; ErrImagePull; manifest unknown; ImagePullBackOff; repository does not exist
expected_recovery_action: Revert image tag to valid version in deployment manifest

injection_method: Change cartservice image to private registry without imagePullSecret

injection_method: Change productcatalogservice image to typo in registry URL

injection_method: Change checkoutservice image digest to invalid SHA256

injection_method: Change loadgenerator image to rate-limited registry causing throttle

injection_method: Cordon and drain worker01; simulate kubelet failure via systemctl stop kubelet
expected_root_cause: worker01 kubelet stopped; node transitions to NotReady; pods rescheduled to other workers

expected_log_patterns: node not ready; NodeNotReady; Taint node.kubernetes.io/not-ready added; evicting pod
expected_recovery_action: Restart kubelet on worker01; uncordon node

injection_method: Block worker02 API server communication via iptables (simulate network partition)
expected_root_cause: worker02 cannot reach API server; kubelet reports but lease expires; node marked NotReady
primary_symptoms: Node NotReady after lease timeout (~40s); pod status Unknown; eventual eviction
expected_log_patterns: node not ready; NodeNotReady; node lease expired; failed to update lease
expected_recovery_action: Remove iptables rule blocking API server; verify network connectivity

injection_method: Exhaust memory on worker03 via stress-ng causing kernel OOM
expected_root_cause: worker03 under extreme memory pressure; kubelet becomes unresponsive; node transitions to NotReady
primary_symptoms: Node MemoryPressure condition; then NotReady; pod evictions; node-exporter metrics gap
expected_log_patterns: node not ready; MemoryPressure; evicting pod due to memory pressure; OOM
expected_recovery_action: Kill stress-ng process; wait for memory recovery; uncordon if needed

injection_method: Simulate disk pressure on worker01 by filling root filesystem to >95%
expected_root_cause: worker01 reports DiskPressure; transitions to NotReady if sustained; pod evictions begin
primary_symptoms: Node DiskPressure condition; eviction of BestEffort pods; new scheduling rejected
expected_log_patterns: DiskPressure; evicting pod due to disk pressure; node has disk pressure
expected_recovery_action: Remove temporary files; expand disk; clean unused images with crictl

injection_method: Stop containerd on worker02 causing runtime failure
expected_root_cause: worker02 container runtime unavailable; existing pods fail health checks; node goes NotReady
primary_symptoms: Node NotReady; container runtime down event; all pods on node fail; rescheduling
expected_log_patterns: container runtime is down; PLEG is not healthy; NodeNotReady; runtime state check error
expected_recovery_action: Restart containerd on worker02; verify runtime health

injection_method: Create PVC with non-existent StorageClass name

expected_log_patterns: no persistent volumes available; storageclass premium-ssd not found; FailedScheduling; waiting for volume
expected_recovery_action: Change StorageClass to 'local-path' in PVC manifest

injection_method: Request PVC with 500Gi exceeding available local-path capacity

primary_symptoms: Prometheus PVC Pending; monitoring data loss; new metrics not stored
expected_log_patterns: waiting for a volume to be created; insufficient storage; ProvisioningFailed
expected_recovery_action: Reduce PVC size or add disk capacity to worker nodes

injection_method: Delete local-path-provisioner deployment causing provisioner unavailability

expected_log_patterns: waiting for volume; no volume plugin matched; provisioner not available
expected_recovery_action: Restore local-path-provisioner deployment via FluxCD reconcile

injection_method: Set PVC accessMode to ReadWriteMany on local-path (only supports ReadWriteOnce)
